'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=CJiUJnSdAmsfVb8XVTIQGLxAAJ957PvrP9LVy18FvJM-1773081909-1.0.1.1-dC9AJ9c0ZkoOEK9dGYx7hWIDJxFVTYOr2aJpXTGX9Uk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
